title: Best trails near Elliott Bay - Seattle - AllTrails
content: 4.4(4,069 reviews) Great views Fully Paved, great views the entire time, dog & children friendly. We enjoyed all the new plantings and Seattle Skyline Overlook

title: Tours & tickets Elliott Bay, Seattle - GetYourGuide
content: 4.5 out of 5 stars 4.5 (670 reviews) Be captivated by 360-degree panoramic views … we had great views all around Seattle.

title: Elliott Bay Trail - All You SHOULD Know Before Going ... - Tripadvisor
content: This trail is entirely paved, really flat, well traveled, and offers terrific views of the downtown Seattle skyline, Elliott Bay, and the Space Needle.

title: View of Elliot Bay from the Seattle Overlook Walk - Facebook
content: A fun and exciting experience I'd recommend to take in the views of the skyline and surrounding city and land scapes!

title: ELLIOTT BAY TRAIL - 68 Photos & 11 Reviews - Parks - Yelp
content: So worth it! There were many people picnicking, jogging, biking, hovering, walking their dogs, etc. It was a beautiful scene. This park is very walkable all
